data.body:
## Description

**What**: Add integration research step to preplanning (after story decomposition, before adversarial review).
**Why**: Identifies verified constraints and known-working code at story level while the user is engaged and can redirect.
**Scope**:
- IN: Preplanning SKILL.md modification, keyword-based story qualification, WebSearch for each qualifying story, Considerations update with Verified Integration Constraints, sandbox availability flagging, high-risk story flagging for spike creation
- OUT: Adversarial review changes (S4), brainstorm feasibility review (S2)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, integration research runs for qualifying stories after decomposition and before adversarial review ← Satisfies SC2
- When this story is complete, findings are added as Verified Integration Constraints in Considerations ← Satisfies SC2
- When this story is complete, missing sandbox is flagged to user during preplanning ← Satisfies SC2
- When this story is complete, stories with no verified code are flagged as high-risk for spike creation ← Satisfies SC2
- Unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- [Testing] WebSearch-dependent — tests must validate without live network calls; use deterministic fixtures
- [Reliability] WebSearch may return no results — graceful fallback (flag high-risk, do not block)

**Escalation policy**: Escalate to the user whenever you do not have high confidence in your understanding of the work, approach, or intent. High confidence means clear evidence from the codebase or ticket context — not inference or reasonable assumption. When in doubt, stop and ask rather than guess.
